prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含2021-2023年理科）最低位次分别为8576→8038→8568→10251→8497名，整体呈波动走势。2024年因新高考首年（理科→物理类）位次大幅后 移至10251名，2025年迅速回升至8497名，较2024年提升约1754名，显示报考热度明显回暖。近5年均值约8786名，2025年基准位次约8497名；2021–2023年理科 计划分别为71、72、72人；2024年物理类计划71人；2025年物理类计划63人（较2024年缩减8人）；2026年物理类计划66人，较2025年增加3人，扩招约4.76% ，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东华大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名持续上升：2021年第81名→2022年第80名→2023年第77名→2024年第76名→2025年第74 名→2026年第72名，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；声誉文件中东华大学在2021–2026年各高考周期内均未出现，说明无明显负面舆情事件，学 校声誉平稳。抖音热度总排名第96位（样本15条视频），评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度不高，未出现特别突出的热度信号。投档异常文件中亦无东华大学记录，近年无断档或 暴跌情况；第五轮学科评估中，材料科学与工程获评A等级，为该校最强学科。招生专业中材料类（含高分子材料与工程、无机非金属材料工程、复合材料与工 程）及功能材料直接对应材料科学与工程A学科，纺织类（纺织工程、非织造材料与工程）为该校传统特色方向，服装设计与工程为"双一流"学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026 年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业持续高热推荐，与东华大学物理类招生专业高度重合；生化环材类专业仍处于明显劝退状态， 但东华大学材料类因A学科加持热度略好于一般院校。黑龙江省2026年高考总考生约167000人，较2025年172114人减少约3%，竞争略有缓和。；东华大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对黑龙江省考生有较强地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的报考热度趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+3人）缓解竞争、软科排名持续上升增强学 校吸引力、黑龙江省考生总数略降等因素。预测2026年物理类最低位次约8760名，区间8260–9260名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science from 2021-2023) were 8576 → 8038 → 8568 → 10251 → 8497, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, due to the first year of the new Gaokao (Science → Physics Category), the ranking significantly dropped to 10251, but quickly rebounded to 8497 in 2025, an increase of about 1754 places compared to 2024, indicating a clear recovery in application popularity. The 5-year average is about 8786, with a baseline ranking of about 8497 for 2025. From 2021 to 2023, the Science enrollment plans were 71, 72, and 72 respectively; in 2024, the Physics Category plan was 71; in 2025, the Physics Category plan was 63 (a reduction of 8 compared to 2024); in 2026, the Physics Category plan is 66, an increase of 3 from 2025, an expansion of about 4.76%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Donghua University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 81st in 2021 → 80th in 2022 → 77th in 2023 → 76th in 2024 → 74th in 2025 → 72nd in 2026, showing continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In the reputation file, Donghua University did not appear in any Gaokao cycle from 2021 to 2026, indicating no significant negative public opinion events and a stable reputation. Its overall Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (sample of 15 videos), rated as 'average', with low exposure on short video platforms and no particularly prominent popularity signals. There are also no records of Donghua University in the abnormal admission files, with no gaps or sharp drops in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-level, the strongest discipline at the university. Among the enrollment majors, Materials Category (including Polymer Materials and Engineering, Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Composite Materials and Engineering) and Functional Materials directly correspond to the A-level Materials Science and Engineering discipline. Textile Category (Textile Engineering, Nonwoven Materials and Engineering) is the university's traditional characteristic direction, and Fashion Design and Engineering is a 'Double First-Class' discipline.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: According to 2026 major popularity data, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, which highly overlap with Donghua University's Physics Category enrollment majors. Majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are still clearly discouraged, but Donghua University's Materials Category, due to its A-level discipline, has slightly better popularity than average institutions. The total number of Gaokao examinees in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is about 167,000, a decrease of about 3% from 172,114 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to examinees from Heilongjiang Province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in rankings in 2025 indicating a recovery in application popularity, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+3 students) easing competition, the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings enhancing the university's appeal, and the slight decrease in the total number of examinees in Heilongjiang Province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be about 8760, with a range of 8260 to 9260.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 8760, with a range of 8260 to 9260. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 8260 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Computer Category, Artificial Intelligence, and Electronic Information Category. Candidates with rankings around 8760 are advised to consider Tier 2 majors like Mathematics Category, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering Category as primary choices. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 9260 can consider Tier 3 majors such as Materials Category (with A-level discipline advantage) and Textile Category as safety options. Note that Materials Science and Engineering is the only A-level discipline at Donghua University. Although related majors fall under the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials categories, the discipline's strength is outstanding, making it suitable for candidates interested in the materials direction.
